title: MfgProgramTemplate - Metadata API
description: Represents a definition of a program to create a program-based business. A program-based business, also known as a Manufacturing Program, enables manufacturers to drive their business models with forecasting tools and manage the end-to-end sales process efficiently.

description.description: The description of the manufacturing program template.

programTemplateItems.description: The list of templates associated with the manufacturing program template.

programTemplateName.description: The unique identifier for the manufacturing program template.

status.description: The status of the manufacturing program template.Values are: Active Draft Inactive The default value is Active.

advAccountForecastSet.description: The forecast set associated with the transformation.

contextDefinition.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Update
contextDefinition.description: The context definition that defines how data is mapped and transformed to the target, such as an opportunity or account.

description.description: The description of the manufacturing program template item.

sourceContextMappingName.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Update
sourceContextMappingName.description: The context mapping that defines how data is mapped from a list of facts(Input Data) to create structured information.

targetContextMappingName.properties: Create, Filter, Group, Nillable, Sort, Update
targetContextMappingName.description: The context mapping that defines how the structured data is saved to the target, such as an opportunity or sales agreement.

templateItemName.description: The name of the manufacturing program template item.

transformationDisplayOrder.description: The display order of the transformation in the manufacturing program template.

transformationType.description: Specifies the type of transformation.Values are: BusinessTransformation ForecastSetRelation

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of a MfgProgramTemplate component.
declarative_metadata_sample_definition.code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<MfgProgramTemplate xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
     <description>Program Template</description>
     <programTemplateItems>
         <templateItemName>Template Item #1</templateItemName>
         <transformationDisplayOrder>1</transformationDisplayOrder>
         <transformationType>BusinessTransformation</transformationType>
         <description>Program Template Item</description>
     </programTemplateItems>
     <programTemplateName>Sample Program Template</programTemplateName>
     <status>Draft</status>
</MfgProgramTemplate>
